description: Content-first marketing / docs / blog / pricing site. Heavy read, near-zero write. SEO-critical. Islands Architecture (Astro) or pure SSG (11ty, Hugo, Next.js static export). Every JS byte must justify itself.

anti_recommendations.spa-for-marketing: kill — SEO catastrophe in 2026 search/AI-search algorithms
anti_recommendations.third-party-tag-soup: kill — every script adds LCP + INP
anti_recommendations.google-tag-manager-on-marketing: warn — measure CWV regression before adding
anti_recommendations.custom-cms-build: kill — use headless CMS or MDX, not a build project
anti_recommendations.next-app-router-for-static-marketing: warn — RSC complexity tax with no payoff on near-zero-write surface

canon_references: Astro team, Islands Architecture (Eisenberg, 2021) — partial hydration
Web Almanac (HTTP Archive, 2025) on marketing-site weight distribution
Addy Osmani, Web Performance for the Modern Web (2024)
Brad Frost, Atomic Design (2016) — content-first layering
